name: Tibetan Thangka Painting
primary_sources: Giuseppe Tucci's works on Tibetan art

distinctive_features: Central deity surrounded by smaller figures
Mounted on textile backing with silk cover
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Varies from small (portrait size) to several meters
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Central figure flanked by smaller figures, often in framed compartments

domain_specific_visual.TEXTILE_BACKING: Mounted on textile backing with silk cover

domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLIC_REPRESENTATION: Depicts the life of Buddha and Buddhist teachings

relationships.description: Central figure often represents a Buddhist deity or scene
Incorporates elements from Han Chinese painting

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: Tibet, Nepal, Mongolia, Bhutan, Himalayan regions
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents Buddhist teachings and serves as a meditation aid
primary_sources: Giuseppe Tucci's works on Tibetan art
